ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  India Power Corporation Limited is in severe financial distress, having commenced Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP) as per an NCLT order dated May 15, 2026, which has suspended the Board of Directors' powers. A significant red flag is the sale of 197,082 equity shares (valued at approximately Rs. 14.76 lakhs) by Aksara Commercial Private Limited, a promoter group entity, between June 17-24, 2026. This promoter divestment during insolvency proceedings further signals extreme financial distress and will likely have a material negative impact on investor confidence and shareholder value.
